WIS: +2 INT: +2 HP: +30 MANA: +30 ENDUR: +30
SV FIRE: +10
Focus: Summoning Efficiency III
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Lore Item
Slot: FACE
AC: 7
WIS: +2 INT: +2 HP: +30 MANA: +30 ENDUR: +30
SV FIRE: +10
Focus: Summoning Efficiency III
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL

Race: ALL

Rarity: Rare

a bottomless devourer
a mortiferous golem

Send a correction
Post Comment
new price
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2002 at 5:52 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592793169098
143 posts
Due to effect added evry level 60 mage now wants one of these cuase it will reduces their pets mana cost by a huge ammount.

This now go for 1500pp on Morell Thule
▲ Page top
RE: new price
QuoteReply
# Dec 23 2005 at 7:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782793772
Scholar
435 posts
Unforunately, since the pet canni nerf, these veils are vastly less useful than they were. I sold one a few days ago for 1500pp, but the average price seems to be more like a couple of hundred when I see them in the bazaar.
▲ Page top
RE: new price
QuoteReply
# Aug 09 2002 at 2:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591759292023
31 posts
I think necros should like it even more, except that mages usually chain summon their pets.
Mage pets cost a max of 400, while necro pets cost a max of 650 mana.
I paid 1k on Cazic Thule just the other day and at lvl 15 my necro can really notice the difference.
▲ Page top
RE: new price
QuoteReply
# Aug 24 2002 at 9:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775709720
78 posts
This is Bogus.

Summoning Efficiency does not affect nec/sk pets. Reanimation Efficiency does.
Casting the lvl 49 pet I use up 26% of my mana, with or without this item. Also you do not get the focus effect text (XY flickers with a pale blue light).

▲ Page top
RE: new price
QuoteReply
# Feb 13 2003 at 10:01 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592341837046
View User Forum
Scholar
582 posts
As of a patch or 2 ago, the "summoning" Focus items apply to all pets, including Necromancers' skeleton pets, and Beastlords' Warders.
▲ Page top
RE: new price
QuoteReply
# Nov 29 2003 at 10:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782793772
Scholar
435 posts
However, Necros typically summon a pet once, med up and start killing. Mages often summon pets to regenerate mana: at 51 my Mage can get 50% of their mana bar back in about a minute by summoning pets and then using Reclaim Energy to get back more than the mana used to summon them. With one of these masks to further reduce the cost of the pet summon, it will be even faster... should be another 30-40 mana per pet.
▲ Page top
New Focus Effect
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2002 at 9:32 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1675642673419
8 posts
As of the 6\5\02 patch this item now has the worn effect off "Summoning Efficienty III"

Edited, Wed Jun 5 22:36:48 2002

QuoteReply
